key_drivers: Iran war driving oil supply disruption and geopolitical risk premium, supporting CL while elevating VIX above 24
Rising 10Y real yields (DFII10 at 1.82%, +17bps over 1 month from ~1.65%) and widening HY credit spreads (3.06%) creating headwinds for equities and precious metals
BoJ hawkish pivot (April hike to 1.00% expected) and ECB rate hike pricing driving FX divergence from USD, supporting JPY and EUR

fed_stance.source: CME FedWatch - Fed funds target 3.50-3.75%, next FOMC March 31, 2026; no cut priced for March

real_yields.source: FRED DFII10 - 1.82% as of 2026-03-10 (updated Mar 11); 1-month trend rising from ~1.65% (+17bps)

vix_level.source: TradingView CBOE-VIX - 24.23 at close (20:15 GMT), down -0.70 (-2.81%) on day

vix_direction.source: TradingView CBOE-VIX - 24.23, down -2.81% from prev close 24.93

gdpnow.source: Atlanta Fed GDPNow - 2.1% Q1 2026 estimate (Mar 6), revised down sharply from ~3.0%

credit_spreads.source: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 - HY OAS at 3.06% as of 2026-03-10, widened from ~2.7% lows

sox.source: TradingView NASDAQ:SOX - 7914.56, +0.63% today but -0.96% 1-month; mixed signals

yield_curve_2s10s.source: FRED T10Y2Y - 0.57% as of 2026-03-11, rising from ~0.50% recent levels

copper.source: CME/Yahoo Finance HG=F - $5.82-5.89/lb, down -0.74% to -1.39% today; down from ~$6.09 1-month ago

gold_etf_flows.source: Seeking Alpha/ETFAction - GLD saw $4.58B outflow week ending Mar 11 (largest weekly outflow in years); $2.91B single-day outflow on Mar 5 (largest in decade)

oil_inventories.source: EIA Weekly Petroleum Status Report (released Mar 11, 2026) - crude inventories rose +3.8M bbl week ending Mar 6, 2026

geopolitical_risk.source: Multiple news sources - US-Israel-Iran War week 2; southern Iraqi output down 70%; Strait of Hormuz disruption risk

oil_supply.source: CSIS/Steptoe analysis - Iranian attacks damaged oil infrastructure; WTI at $90.77/bbl (EIA highlights)

ecb_stance.source: ECB held Feb 5, 2026; Reuters Mar 10 - markets pricing 2 rate hikes for 2026; Morningstar - ECB hike risk from Iran war inflation

eur_rate_differential.source: ECB hawkish tilt (hike pricing) vs Fed neutral hold - EUR-USD differential narrowing (bullish EUR)

eurozone_growth.source: Morningstar - Iran war pushing Europe toward stagflation risk; growth outlook deteriorating

rba_stance.source: RBA hiked 25bp to 3.85% on Feb 3, 2026; Westpac (Mar 11) forecasting 25bp hikes in both March and May 2026

aud_rate_differential.source: RBA hiking cycle (3.85%, expected 4.10% by May) vs Fed hold at 3.50-3.75%

risk_sentiment_aud.source: VIX at 24.23 (>20 = risk-off); Middle East war ongoing

china_growth.source: NBS Mfg PMI 49.0 (Feb, contracting) vs S&P Global/RatingDog PMI 52.1 (Feb, expanding); net stable/mixed

boj_stance.source: BoJ at 0.75% (30-year high, raised Dec 2025); Reuters/Bloomberg Mar 11 - April hike to 1.00% expected

jpy_rate_differential.source: BoJ hiking cycle while Fed holds - JPY-USD differential narrowing (bullish JPY/6J)

fallbacks_used: Copper price from CME/Yahoo Finance HG=F (Investing.com blocked by policy restriction)
Gold ETF flows from Seeking Alpha/ETFAction news sources (World Gold Council direct data not directly verified today)
